text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Beginning Exchange... "Aligning" coordinates,
casting a Range...

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
I see promising Variable Stars in this Habitable
Zone. Many.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
...But there is a Break. The Spectrum has reached
its limit.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
...Neo Universe reporting intent to proceed. I will
go far beyond—beyond Entropy.
